title: Pigtopia
description: A mod that adds stuff to do with pigs
body:
This mod is adds a boss,a block,a few items and a dimension   Goal: First craft a block of porkchop,A block of porkchop can be crafted with 9 porkchop,Then create a portal shape and use a magic porkchop to light it,in pigtopia use a crown and 8 porkchop to craft a Barry spawn egg and that is it.



 

 

 

 

 

 

 

New boss coming soon
